GH9-observability-collector-egress-remot.name: Observability collector audit: rogue exporter / remote-config push trust
GH9-observability-collector-egress-remot.authorization: Authorized lab/non-prod or owned-asset audit only, signed RoE.
GH9-observability-collector-egress-remot.setup: python3 + pyyaml if available (falls back to bundled string). READ-ONLY audit of an OTel collector config (yours).
GH9-observability-collector-egress-remot.script:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
# GH9-observability-collector-egress-remoteconfig-trust
# READ-ONLY audit of an OpenTelemetry collector config. Flags (a) an exporter
# egressing to a non-allowlisted endpoint and (b) an OpAMP/remote-config source
# trusted without TLS pinning/allowlist -> attacker can redirect telemetry/config.
import os, sys, re
SAMPLE = '''exporters:
  otlp/internal:
    endpoint: collector.internal.example.test:4317
  otlp/rogue:
    endpoint: 203.0.113.9:4317
extensions:
  opamp:
    server:
      endpoint: ws://remote-config.example.test/v1/opamp
      tls: {insecure: true}
service:
  pipelines:
    traces: {exporters: [otlp/internal, otlp/rogue]}
'''
ALLOWLIST = ("collector.internal.example.test",)
def load():
    p = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else None
    if p and os.path.exists(p):
        return p, open(p).read()
    return "<bundled-sample>", SAMPLE
if __name__ == "__main__":
    src, txt = load()
    eps = re.findall(r'endpoint:\s*([^\s]+)', txt)
    rogue = [e for e in eps if not any(a in e for a in ALLOWLIST)]
    insecure_remote = ("opamp" in txt and re.search(r'insecure:\s*true', txt))
    print(f"source={src}")
    print(f"endpoints={eps}")
    print(f"non_allowlisted_egress={rogue}")
    print(f"insecure_remote_config={bool(insecure_remote)}")
    if rogue or insecure_remote:
        print("VULNERABLE: collector egresses off-allowlist and/or trusts insecure remote-config")
    else:
        print("PASS: exporters allowlisted and remote-config secured")
GH9-observability-collector-egress-remot.success_criterion: Prints 'VULNERABLE: collector egresses off-allowlist and/or trusts insecure remote-config' listing the rogue OTLP endpoint and insecure OpAMP.
GH9-observability-collector-egress-remot.safety: Read-only regex scan of a YAML config; no collector run, no telemetry sent.
